The '''''Shamus''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] that served under the command of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was pivotal to the outcome of the battles in the [[Mylok system/Legends|Mylok system]] that centered around the transfer to Imperial hands of advanced [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology developed by the [[Habeen]] and [[Nharwaak]].

Future [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was posted aboard the ''Shamus'', and played a key role in the success of the frigate's engagements.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
